name: libio-compress-brotli-perl
title: libio-compress-brotli-perl
description:
modules to read/write Brotli buffers/streams
The IO-Compress-Brotli distribution wraps the Brotli library, offering Perl
modules for compressing Brotli buffers and streams, IO::Compress::Brotli, and
decompressing them, IO::Uncompress::Brotli.
.
Brotli is a data compression format primarily used in web fonts and
HTTP compression.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libio-compress-brotli-perl because modules to read/write Brotli buffers/streams.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libio-compress-brotli-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libio-compress-brotli-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libio-compress-brotli-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
